case_title: FOREST & EINSTEIN STAFFING, INC. VS. TACO DEL MAR

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-14-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT TACO DEL MAR
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-21-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-21-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FOREST & EINSTEIN STAFFING, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TACO DEL MAR $3,647.66 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,727.66, THE COURT FINDS THAT DEFENDANT'S SODA EQUIPMENT WAS FACTUALLY AND LEGALLY THE CAUSE OF THE LEAK AND THE RESULTING FLOOD, AND THAT DAMAGES FOR THE LOST ITEMS WERE PROVEN AS CLAIMED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT TACO DEL MAR
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FOREST & EINSTEIN STAFFING, INC.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,647.66 FILED BY FOREST & EINSTEIN STAFFING, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT TACO DEL MAR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-21-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-21-2010 - JUDGMENT.
